subject: feat(mobile): add currentColor grid icon to mobile header
body:
Inline SVG icon derived from the 2x3 grid pattern in icon.svg but
using currentColor instead of hardcoded purple gradients. Adapts to
any DaisyUI theme via text color inheritance. Stripped background,
gradients, and image/text hints — too small at 24px header size.

Tags: ui, mobile, icon
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
